title: Cobblemon LowHand Extreme Optimize
description: Welcome to Cobblemon LowHand Extreme Optimize — the lightest Cobblemon experience ever created!
body:
# 🧬 Based on Cobblemon – Ultra Lightweight Edition

👇 Explore details below 👇

Welcome to **Cobblemon LowHand Extreme Optimize** — the **lightest Cobblemon experience ever created!**

---

## ⚡ Built for Low-End Devices

![Image](https://images.1v9.gg/best%20minecraft%20low%20end%20shaders-6c7cd4540be4.webp)

![Image](https://hypixel.net/attachments/pojav-launcher-thumbnail-png.3090429/)

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VqzM1npM/images/252aac46b4a0d6ba2f081265d41af54dfebda0b2.jpeg)

![Image](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/images/0/0a/The_Foundation_Update.png)

This modpack is specially designed for players who **cannot run heavy modpacks**.

✔ Runs on **3GB RAM devices**
✔ Supports **Mobile (PojavLauncher / MojLauncher)**
✔ Works on **very low-end PCs / laptops**
✔ Smooth & stable gameplay

Now everyone can enjoy Cobblemon — even on weak devices.

---

## 🧬 Pure Cobblemon Experience

![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/742/345/battle.png)

![Image](https://backend.cobblemon.com/uploads/lapras_single_1269b031b2.webp)

![Image](https://cobbledex.b-cdn.net/3dmons/previews/large/25.webp)

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a9fbd3e9f64e33e424d0112d4d75200ff85eb80.png)

This is a **minimal modpack** focused only on performance.

✔ Only **Cobblemon**
✔ No extra heavy mods
✔ No unnecessary features
✔ Clean & simple gameplay

Just:

* Catch Pokémon
* Battle
* Explore

Nothing else. No lag.

---

## 🏎️ Extreme Optimization

![Image](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality%3D85%2Cformat%3Dauto/assets/3bd0b9d0cf-fps-comparison.png)

![Image](https://images.1v9.gg/Best%20High-End%20Graphics%20Settings%20for%20Minecraft-eff38ad7b252.webp)

![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/675/498/2023-06-10_23.png)

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3554eb9b6ac2b445f66709ffc327bcbf30c93b3.jpeg)

Every part of this pack is tuned for:

⚡ Maximum FPS
⚡ Faster loading times
⚡ Reduced lag spikes
⚡ Smooth multiplayer experience

Designed for **“Low Hand” users who still want full Cobblemon gameplay**

---

## 🌍 Play on Pokefun SMP (Recommended)

![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/979/815/gallery_lava01.png)

![Image](https://img.builtbybit.com/W-dIHdjxuDj3aZCsEmbXeQ2TZ_8kX9WDrclBLxXRSgw/resize%3Afill%3A2000/format%3Awebp/aHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9yYWdlLmdvb2dsZWFwaXMuY29tL2JyZWFkYnVpbGRzLXByb2R1Y3RzL1JvY2slMjBQaXhlbG1vbiUyMEd5bS8yMDI0LTAyLTAzXzIzLjE4LjQ5LmpwZw)

![Image](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/4d89168a5d6dafa6a03bfcf9ab11a8f835553e8ff26808db3bd1d377ffcd6a10/68747470733a2f2f692e696d6775722e636f6d2f346270617453612e706e67)

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d89ae710cf9d2fc9154809252e628ee4fdc5fe_0.webp)

Want the **full advanced Cobblemon experience?**

Join our official server:

### 🏆 Pokefun SMP

✔ All Pokémon available
✔ Legendary & Mythical spawns
✔ Mega Evolution, Raids & Events
✔ Active multiplayer community

👉 **Download server modpack:**
[https://store.pokefun.fun/modpacks](https://store.pokefun.fun/modpacks)


📌 **IP:** play.pokefun.fun

---

## 🔥 Why This Modpack?

✔ Extremely lightweight
✔ Beginner friendly
✔ Perfect for mobile players
✔ No lag, no clutter
✔ Just pure Cobblemon

---

## 🛡️ Important Note

This modpack does **NOT include extra features or addons**.

It is focused only on:

👉 Performance
👉 Stability
👉 Accessibility

---

## 🎯 Goal

**Make Cobblemon playable for everyone — even on the weakest devices.**

---
